name: C-13 merge emits at least the operator entry in the merged registry output
command:
printf -- '- id: soc2-tsc
  url: https://b.com
' > bundled.yaml && printf -- '- id: custom-framework
  url: https://x.com
  why_authoritative: company policy
' > operator.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/merge-registry.sh" --operator operator.yaml --emit merged.yaml --bundled bundled.yaml && grep -q 'custom-framework' merged.yaml && echo merged 1>&2
